issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for queue operations.
The skill is vendor-locked to AWS and requires AWS CLI and boto3, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: setup-fifo-queue-with-dlq-and-batch-send
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets most rubric items except ContentBasedDeduplication, while Response A fails on queue names, attributes, and redrive policy.

scenarios.name: batch-receive-process-delete-monitor
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric requirements, while Response A uses short polling and single deletes, missing key elements.
